violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the service area is blocked by a beverage cooler. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Establishment is to move beverage cooler so that hand sink is accessible at all times. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Employees were observed using Comet disinfecting cleaner with bleach to sanitize food contact surfaces. Per product instructions, sanitizer is not approved for food contact surfaces including utensils or equipment. PIC was instructed to cease practice of using Comet disinfecting cleaner with bleach for food contact surfaces. Establishment is to use exclusively approved sanitizing chemicals for food contact surfaces at the approved concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink to allow the execution of wash, rinse, and sanitizing of utensils and dishware. The 3-compartment requirement allows for proper execution of the 3-step manual ware washing procedure. If properly used, the 3 compartments reduce the chance of contaminating the sanitizing water and therefore diluting the strength and efficacy of the chemical sanitizer that may be used. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair and areas are no longer smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Physical facilities shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
